text: F**k you money watches. No diamonds. No space-age materials. No gimmicks. Just proper high end high complicated watchmaking. #patekphilippe #audemarspiguet #richardmille #breguet #alangesohne

The Bugatti Tourbillon Sapphire Crystal by @jacobandco represents the pinnacle of hypercar-inspired watchmaking, crafted entirely from transparent sapphire crystal. Building on earlier versions, this model elevates exclusivity and design by revealing every intricate detail of the watch from all angles, including its Bugatti-inspired elements like the V16 engine automaton. The 54 x 44 mm case, carved from solid sapphire, is exceptionally difficult to produce, requiring over 800 hours of precise machining due to the material’s extreme hardness. Only two unique pieces exist, each showcasing bold colors and the brand’s signature design language.

Beyond its striking appearance, the watch integrates automotive engineering concepts into its movement and display. The Caliber JCAM55 mirrors a car engine’s architecture, featuring a 30-second tourbillon and a functioning V16 engine automaton with 16 moving pistons. The dial is inspired by a car dashboard, with retrograde hour and minute hands and indicators for both movement and automaton power reserves. The automaton can perform multiple animation sequences, bringing the miniature engine to life. Priced at $1.2 million, the timepiece embodies a seamless fusion of high watchmaking and automotive innovation.

#jacobandco #bugatti #tourbillon #sapphire #2026

The devil is in the details with the Spider Challenge. @artisansdegeneve 

Artisans de Genève is an independent workshop customizing watches at the request of their owners. Not affiliated with or authorized by any watch brand. Trademarks are used solely for descriptive purposes in relation to the original watches; all modifications are made independently and without any approval from the original brand. Each customized watch is for private use only. The work presented was commissioned by a client and reflects our know-how only; it does not constitute an offer.

#artisansdegeneve #pieceunique #bespoke #custom #watch

The Daytona Avia Grey by @diw_official reinterprets performance through the language of aviation and advanced materials. Its high-end carbon fiber case reveals a layered structure where every line is driven by engineering rather than ornament.

Jacob & Co. introduces a world first: The Godfather II, the only double melody musical timepiece. @jacobandco 

Jacob & Co. expands its popular Godfather-inspired collection with The Godfather II, a highly complex musical watch that plays two iconic melodies—“The Godfather’s Waltz” and “The Godfather Love Theme.” Designed in a curved, Art Deco-style case, the timepiece combines refined aesthetics with advanced engineering, including a flying tourbillon, dual power reserve indicators, and a unique melody selector that lets the wearer switch between songs. Limited to 74 pieces, the watch pays tribute to the 1974 release of The Godfather Part II while showcasing improved sound quality and a more compact design.

At the heart of caliber JCAM62 is an intricate music box system built around a comb and cylinder. The comb’s18 steel teeth produce different notes depending on their length, while a pin-studded brass cylinder activates them in sequence.A lateral shift of less than a millimeter, controlled by the melody selector, changes which pins engage the comb, allowing the watch to alternate between the two compositions.

Its design features references to the film, such as a portrait of Don Corleone, noir-inspired details, and symbolic engravings, while the intricate music box mechanism drives its signature melodies. For founder Jacob Arabo, the watch reflects both his admiration for the film and his own journey as an immigrant, making it not just a luxury timepiece but a deeply personal and artistic creation.

#jacobandco #tourbillon #godfather #doncorleone #corleone
